text.title: OpenAI Embeddings — Output Contract
text.summary: Per-chunk embedding record persisted in the vector store. Captures custom_id, model, dims, vector length, source hash, and original text.

list.item: custom_id — stable across retries; format `doc_{id}_chunk_{n}` or equivalent.
model + dimensions — must match pipeline-wide pin.
source_hash — sha1/sha256 of chunk_text, used to dedupe re-embeds.
chunk_text — original text kept alongside the vector.

antipattern.reason: Indicates ingestion/query mismatch; downstream similarity scores are meaningless.
Zero-content chunks produce near-zero vectors that cluster anomalously.
Breaks Batch API result correlation; loses chunk on collision.

example.code: { "custom_id": "doc_42_chunk_3", "model": "text-embedding-3-small", "dimensions": 1536, "vector_len": 1536, "source_hash": "9a8b7c6d5e4f3210", "chunk_text": "Embeddings encode semantic meaning into dense vectors...", "embedded_at": "2026-05-22T12:34:56Z" }

example.note: Invalid: vector_len mismatches dimensions; source_hash empty; chunk_text empty; embedded_at missing.

list.item: model is in the pinned enum.
